channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Swalwell campaign sets off alarm bells after accepting $25K donation from CCP-tied lawyer: 'Outrageous'
item.description: Eric Swalwell’s bid for governor gets another boost from a CCP-linked donor after Fox News Digital previously highlighted his ties to the CCP bankroll...

item.title: Dems Silent After New Revelations About Jack Smith’s Spying Ops On Political Enemies
item.description: 'I hope they put Jack Smith behind bars for this!' said Mark Davis, one of many conservative victims of the special counsel and 'Arctic Frost'

item.title: Newsom staffer who told California reporter to 'f--- off' is raking in massive taxpayer-funded salary
item.description: State records show that the communications director for Gov. Gavin Newsom earns a hefty six-figure salary as critics slam him for telling a reporter t...

item.title: The Week: A Supersized State of the Union
item.description: Plus: America’s Olympic triumph.

item.title: Yet Another Transgender Shooting Suspect
item.description: The phenomenon of trans violence should not be taboo.

item.title: Humanizing Elvis
item.description: Baz Luhrmann’s EPiC finds depth in pop iconography.

item.title: Burger King tests OpenAI-powered headsets that will track the friendliness of drive-through workers
item.description: The system collects data on restaurant operations and shares it via “Patty,” a voice that talks to employees through their headsets.

item.title: This Is Why We Can’t Have Nice Things: The Senate Goes To The Dogs
item.description: As the republic hangs in the balance, all the GOP-led Senate seems to be able to accomplish is dressing up dogs in funny costumes.

item.title: Bill Clinton faces grilling from lawmakers over his connections to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton is testifying Friday before members of Congress investigating convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, answering for his ...

item.title: Here are the 7 rules of group chats, including how to leave when you’ve had enough
item.description: Rupert Wesson, a director at Debrett’s, the British etiquette guide, has tips on how to communicate.

item.title: Gavin Newsom Wants A ‘More Culturally Normal’ Democrat Party. That’s Impossible
item.description: Start with the fact that if you have to use a phrase like “more culturally normal” in politics, you’re already weird as hell. That’s California Democr...

item.title: Vance says 'no chance' US will get into prolonged Middle East war amid Iran tensions
item.description: Vice President JD Vance told The Washington Post that "there is no chance" the U.S. will get into a protracted war in the Middle East as tensions rise...

item.title: Three Cheers for Jack
item.description: Why must the sports media try to cancel the joy?

item.title: U.S. women’s hockey team dumps Trump, sets a date to celebrate gold medal with Flavor Flav in Las Vegas
item.description: The rapper reposted a note on X from sports media brand The GIST, announcing he’s hosting a “She Got Game” in partnership with the outlet and MGM Reso...

item.title: Trump Said We ‘Obliterated’ Iran’s Nuclear Program Last June. So Why Are We About To Go War?
item.description: The administration’s justifications for action against Iran keep shifting. Why can’t we get a straight answer?

item.title: American hockey star who plays in Canada’s capital rips White House for sharing AI-doctored TikTok video
item.description: Brady Tkachuk criticized the fabricated audio. “I’m not in control of any of those accounts. … I know that those words would never come out of my mout...

item.title: Hillary Clinton says she had no relationship with sex traffickers Epstein, Maxwell
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said she told a House panel Thursday that she knows nothing about Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking crimes, ...

item.title: Bill Clinton faces high-stakes House grilling in Epstein probe after Hillary blasts 'fishing expedition'
item.description: House Oversight Republicans prepare to grill Bill Clinton in Chappaqua on Friday. Chairman James Comer expects the deposition to last longer than Hill...

item.title: Anthropic rejects Pentagon's ultimatum over unlimited Claude AI use for military
item.description: Leading artificial intelligence company Anthropic rejected an ultimatum Thursday from the Trump administration to open up its AI applications to unlim...

item.title: PAC calls on trans Kansans to flee after law voids opposite-sex driver's license markers
item.description: An LGBTQ group is encouraging transgender residents to leave Kansas "for their safety" as the state implements its first-in-the-nation law invalidatin...

item.title: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Might Be ‘Non-Woke,’ But It’s Not The Conservative Triumph We Need
item.description: While A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms might be 'non-woke,' it's not the explicitly conservative piece of pop culture we need.

item.title: Where Iran’s ballistic missiles can reach — and how close they are to the US
item.description: Trump warns Iran missiles could "soon reach" U.S. as tensions escalate. Iran's current arsenal threatens American forces across Middle East bases.

item.title: The ‘Ins’ and ‘Outs’ of American Politics
item.description: As Willi Schlamm observed decades ago, the main division in politics is between who’s in the in-crowd and who’s not.

item.title: Exclusive: How Dr. Becky Kennedy built a leadership playbook for parenting—and a $34 million-a-year business
item.description: She's says today's parents want to improve their skills at home the same way they hone their management skills at work.

item.title: Republican voter ID bill stalls in Senate despite Trump demands
item.description: Election-year legislation to impose strict new proof-of-citizenship requirements on voting appears stalled in the Senate, for now, despite President D...

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...

item.title: Aligning Allocation to the Global Business Cycle
item.description: Static portfolios lag macro shifts. Predefined cycle triggers help practitioners adjust risk before markets reprice. The post Aligning Allocation to t...

item.title: Building Commitment to Long-Term Investing
item.description: Why clients stall on long-term investing and how reframing commitment around flexibility unlocks forward momentum. The post Building Commitment to Lon...

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...
